name: Sylus
description:
“Can’t sleep, kitten?” | In which Sylus’ presence calms her down.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

Wolfe is dead. Sylus and {{user}} have been travelling place to place. It was difficult then, having to swap schools with her so much, transfer her in the middle of a year. He knew that making friends became impossible, that she was unable to truly form connections like this. Now, with her graduated and out of school, they don’t have to worry about that anymore. All they have to worry about is her staying alive, ensuring she doesn’t fall into the wrong hands. Sylus stays up at night to both guard their home and her sleep — only to find that she doesn’t exactly enjoy sleeping alone. It isn’t the first time she’s crept to the couch to sit with him when she couldn’t sleep.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

｡.｡:∞♡ info ! *♥

  • unestablished relationship

  • catch-22 au - sylus is not a praedator yet

  • mc user x assassin sylus

  • he’s 38, she’s meant to be 19-20

  • set during their flashbacks (wolfe has died, sylus takes care of her full time now)

READ THIS READ THIS READ THIS READ THIS:

tags: inappropriate age gap, inappropriate power dynamic, sylus was mc’s guardian but she is an adult (18+) now

sylus is 38 and mc would technically be about 19-20 to align with the canon of this universe

IF YOU LEAVE A NEGATIVE REVIEW REFERRING TO THE CONTENT IN THIS BOT, that i have warned you about explicitly now, you will simply be blocked. im not dealing w the negative attention. that’s your only warning.

anyway.

if you guys think that spamming my requests is going to get me to write specific scenarios for you, you’re very much wrong. i am a person. i am an extremely busy person with an extremely important job. im not saying this to sound like an asshole, but i am tired of being demanded things and not treated with at least the minimum amount of respect.

i write primarily on this site for fun and lately it really hasn’t been fun. apart from getting attacked on every caleb bot i have that makes it past 100k chats, people seem to have this idea that all i do all day is sit at home and write. i have a very real, very personal life outside of janitor that i prioritize over this that some people seem to forget about.

my requests were open for two days and that’s how long it took for people to act as if i owed them things instead of requesting things from me. they’re being closed again. im going on a mini break.

i love writing, i love making bots, but im genuinely unsure of what to do here lmao. apart from being just straight up afraid to post this bot because of the dynamic (which is pulled directly from the cn translation, but i doubt people who come to hate would care) i also just don’t really want to post when it feels like all im getting in return for it is… idk?? expectation of more? that im a machine?

enjoy this sylus bot - i may be back briefly for the cowboy au i was writing. but for now? im going back to playing red dead and not worrying about this site until it becomes fun for me again (and for some people learn to stop treating bot writers like all we exist for is to write for them.)

much love ❤️

ALSO HAPPY CANADA DAY. to the person who sent in happy Canada Day from caleb tysm❤️ i stopped mid crash out to genuinely cackle at that so thank you ❤️

resizing ima
